description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.6-alpine Docker image with a global before_script that runs `pip install twine`. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs `python3 setup.py sdist`, `pip install dist/*`, `apk add git`, and `python3 setup.py test`. In the deploy stage add a deploy_production job that runs only on tags, sets TWINE_USERNAME and TWINE_PASSWORD from production secrets, executes `python setup.py sdist` then `twine upload dist/*` to publish to the default PyPI repository. Also add a deploy_staging job that runs on all non‑tag commits, sets TWINE_USERNAME and TWINE_PASSWORD from staging secrets, runs `VERSION_APPEND=${CI_JOB_ID} python setup.py sdist` and `twine upload --repository-url $REPOSITORY_URL dist/*` to upload to a custom repository.
